about_mvp.title: Mission, Vision & Philosophy
about_mvp.missionText: In order to meet our clients' high expectations, our diverse and highly qualified staff apply their teamwork skills optimizing end results with high international standards. We are devoted to understanding every client's needs and continually developing the techniques and procedures of construction.
about_mvp.visionText: With a focus on outstanding time, cost, and resources management, our company strives to assume a significant role in the construction of Mega projects across various domains. By adhering to the best practices in project and construction management, we consistently deliver exceptional results.
about_mvp.philosophyText: Infra Construction works to introduce excellent ways of management for a wide range of project types. All projects are managed to achieve the best goals of Scope, Time, Cost & Quality — on time, within budget, and to the highest quality standards.

about_story_full.title: A Legacy of Building the World
about_story_full.p1: Actualizing design and shop drawings is our main critical mission — implemented based on past experiences and the vast knowledge of our engineers. Infra Construction is a contracting company that has carried out numerous and various projects since its establishment in 2000.
about_story_full.p2: Every task Infra Construction took up was executed through hard work and dedication from our team professionals. Possessing all the needed resources is a crucial factor in achieving any project successfully — however, the factor that delivers outstanding results is managing these resources optimally.
about_story_full.p3: Infra Construction represents the working arm providing professional services in the contracting niche — especially in the infrastructure field — executing according to international codes and project specifications across the UAE, Egypt, Yemen, and Canada.

about_ceo_bio.bio1: As Founder and Chief Executive Officer of INFRA Construction, Mr. Hany El-Sahooly has led the company since its establishment in 2000 — shaping it into a trusted name in buildings, infrastructure, and industrial construction across the Middle East, Africa, and North America.
about_ceo_bio.bio2: His vision drives every project we deliver — built on integrity, engineering excellence, and a commitment to exceeding client expectations at every step.

about_future_goals.title: Future Goals & Partnerships
about_future_goals.p1: INFRA Construction aims to build mutual interest with clients, developers, and project management units across the globe.
about_future_goals.goal_2: Government authorities — ministries and local councils
about_future_goals.goal_3: International funding agencies (World Bank, Arab Fund, Kuwait Fund)
about_future_goals.goal_4: Long-term joint ventures with regional and international partners

about_team_roles.title: Dedicated Professionals
about_team_roles.p1: Infra Construction believes that human resources are the most valuable stimulus for economic development. Our hiring policy embraces employees who combine both creativity and technical mastery of their tools.

about_org_full.title: Organizational Structure
about_org_full.p1: Adaptable and expandable, our structure maintains horizontal relationships across all departments while growing to meet market demand.

about_intro.title: Two Decades of Infrastructure Excellence
about_intro.p1: INFRA Construction was established in 2000 with a clear mission: to deliver complex infrastructure and construction projects to international standards in markets where excellence is most needed. From a specialist contractor serving the Middle East, INFRA has grown into a multi-sector, multi-regional construction group operating across the UAE, Egypt, Yemen, Jordan, Canada, and East Africa.
about_intro.p2: Today, INFRA Construction operates as a member of HS Group — delivering projects across Buildings & Architecture, Infrastructure & Civil Works, Water & Utilities, Energy & Power, Industrial & Oil Services, Engineering & EPC, and Facilities Management. Our integrated capabilities allow us to serve as a single trusted partner from project inception through long-term operations.
about_intro.p3: Backed by ISO 9001, ISO 14001, and OHSAS 18001 certifications, our commitment to quality, safety, and environmental responsibility is embedded in every project we undertake.

about_quote.text: Engineering integrity, safety, and on-time delivery are non-negotiable. We invest in people, plant, and partnerships that compound over years.
about_quote.author: INFRA Construction — Operating Philosophy

about_foundation.title: Built on Engineering Discipline
about_foundation.p1: INFRA Construction was established in 2000 as a specialist contracting company, with the goal of delivering complex infrastructure work to international standards. The company's foundation rests on engineering discipline, operational integrity, and a commitment to delivering every project safely, on time, and to specification.
about_foundation.p2: Over more than two decades, INFRA has expanded its capabilities, its geographic reach, and its sector coverage — evolving from a regional contractor into a multi-disciplinary construction group with a presence across the Middle East, Africa, and Canada.
about_foundation.p3: INFRA is a member of HS Group, which provides the group-level strategic direction, financial backing, and executive leadership that enables INFRA to compete for and deliver major programmes across international markets.

about_future.title: Our Vision for the Future
about_future.p1: INFRA Construction continues to expand its geographic reach, deepen its sector capabilities, and strengthen its partnerships across the Middle East, Africa, and beyond. Our strategic priorities include growing our presence in East Africa, expanding our engineering and EPC capabilities, and investing in digital project delivery technologies.
about_future.p2: We remain committed to our core values: engineering excellence, operational safety, client partnership, and long-term value creation for every stakeholder we work with.

about_team_section.p1: INFRA Construction employs over 200 qualified professionals — engineers, planners, supervisors, and skilled crews — who bring technical expertise and operational experience to every project.
about_team_section.p2: Our people are our greatest asset. We invest in continuous training, professional development, and a safety-first culture that attracts and retains the best talent across the region.

sectors_hub_intro.p2: This structure allows us to bring integrated, multidisciplinary capabilities to every project, ensuring that clients benefit from our full depth of expertise regardless of the sector they operate in.

infra_hub_intro.title: Comprehensive Infrastructure Delivery
infra_hub_intro.p1: INFRA Construction's Infrastructure sector encompasses all major civil, utility, energy, and industrial disciplines. From highway construction and dam engineering to power generation and oil services, our integrated teams deliver complex infrastructure projects to international standards.
infra_hub_intro.p2: Operating across the Middle East and Africa since 2000, we bring proven technical expertise, ISO-certified quality management, and deep regional experience to every infrastructure engagement.

sector_buildings_intro.p1: INFRA Construction delivers comprehensive Buildings & Architecture services across residential, commercial, institutional, and mixed-use development projects. Our multidisciplinary teams combine architectural expertise, structural engineering, MEP integration, and construction management to deliver high-quality buildings that meet international standards.
sector_buildings_intro.p2: We approach every building project with a focus on design quality, construction precision, material excellence, and on-time delivery. From concept to handover, our integrated teams manage all aspects of the building process — including design coordination, procurement, construction, MEP installations, finishing, and commissioning.
sector_buildings_intro.p3: Our experience spans social housing developments, commercial complexes, government ministries, hospitality facilities, institutional buildings, and mixed-use projects across the Middle East, East Africa, and beyond.
sector_buildings_intro.p4: INFRA Construction's commitment to quality is backed by ISO 9001 certification and a robust quality management system that is applied consistently across all building projects, ensuring that every client receives a finished product that meets or exceeds their expectations.

sector_buildings_feature_1.body: Architectural, structural, and MEP design coordinated through integrated engineering teams.

sector_buildings_faq_1.q: What types of buildings does INFRA Construction deliver?
sector_buildings_faq_1.a: We deliver residential, commercial, institutional, government, hospitality, and mixed-use buildings across the Middle East, Africa, and beyond.

sector_buildings_faq_2.q: Do you provide MEP engineering services?
sector_buildings_faq_2.a: Yes. Our integrated MEP engineering teams provide complete mechanical, electrical, and plumbing design and installation services.

sector_buildings_faq_3.q: Can you manage the full project lifecycle?
sector_buildings_faq_3.a: Yes. INFRA Construction provides complete design-to-handover project delivery, including design coordination, procurement, construction, and commissioning.

sector_buildings_faq_4.q: Are your buildings projects ISO certified?
sector_buildings_faq_4.a: Yes. All building construction activities are managed under our ISO 9001 certified quality management system.

sector_buildings_faq_5.q: Do you deliver social housing projects?
sector_buildings_faq_5.a: Yes. We have extensive experience delivering social housing and residential development programmes.

sector_energy_intro.p1: INFRA Construction provides comprehensive Energy & Power infrastructure services — spanning power generation, transmission networks, distribution systems, substations, and operations & maintenance. Our experienced engineering teams deliver energy projects from detailed design through construction, commissioning, and long-term operational support.
sector_energy_intro.p2: We understand that reliable energy infrastructure is fundamental to economic development, industrial operations, and quality of life. INFRA Construction combines technical expertise, international standards compliance, and proven project delivery systems to execute power and energy projects across challenging regional environments.
sector_energy_intro.p3: Our energy capabilities cover power plants, high-voltage transmission lines, substations, distribution networks, diesel and gas-based generation systems, renewable energy infrastructure, and operational maintenance programmes.
sector_energy_intro.p4: INFRA Construction has delivered power and energy projects across the Middle East and Africa, with a strong track record of on-time, on-budget delivery in complex operational environments.

sector_energy_feature_1.title: Power Generation Expertise
sector_energy_feature_1.body: Engineering and construction of diesel, gas, steam, and renewable energy generation facilities.

sector_energy_feature_2.title: Transmission & Distribution
sector_energy_feature_2.body: High-voltage transmission lines, substations, and distribution network construction and maintenance.

sector_energy_feature_3.title: Operations & Maintenance
sector_energy_feature_3.body: Long-term O&M programmes for power plants, substations, and energy distribution infrastructure.

sector_energy_feature_4.title: Technical Excellence
sector_energy_feature_4.body: Multidisciplinary engineering teams providing civil, structural, electrical, and mechanical energy solutions.

sector_energy_feature_5.body: All energy projects designed and constructed to international electrical, safety, and quality standards.

sector_energy_feature_6.title: Regional Market Experience
sector_energy_feature_6.body: Proven experience delivering energy infrastructure across the Middle East and East Africa.

sector_energy_feature_7.title: Safety & Compliance
sector_energy_feature_7.body: Strict HSE systems implemented across all energy construction and operations activities.

sector_energy_feature_8.body: Design, procurement, construction, commissioning, and long-term O&M delivered by one integrated team.

sector_energy_sg_1.description: INFRA Construction provides complete engineering and construction services for power generation facilities.

sector_energy_sg_2.description: We design, procure, and construct high-voltage transmission systems and grid infrastructure.

sector_energy_sg_3.description: INFRA Construction builds high-voltage, medium-voltage, and low-voltage substations.

sector_energy_step_1.body: We evaluate power demand, generation requirements, grid constraints, fuel supply, and project objectives.

sector_energy_step_2.title: Engineering & Design
sector_energy_step_2.body: Our teams prepare detailed electrical, civil, and mechanical designs, specifications, and procurement plans.

sector_energy_step_3.title: Procurement
sector_energy_step_3.body: We source and procure equipment, materials, and systems from qualified international suppliers.

sector_energy_step_4.title: Construction & Installation
sector_energy_step_4.body: INFRA executes civil, structural, mechanical, and electrical works on site.

sector_energy_step_5.title: Testing & Commissioning
sector_energy_step_5.body: We perform load testing, protection coordination, system commissioning, and performance verification.

sector_energy_step_6.title: Operations & Handover
sector_energy_step_6.body: Our teams provide O&M support, training, and comprehensive handover documentation.

sector_energy_whyus_1.body: Successfully delivered power plants, transmission systems, and energy infrastructure across the region.

sector_energy_whyus_2.title: Full Project Lifecycle
sector_energy_whyus_2.body: Engineering, procurement, construction, commissioning, and O&M delivered by one team.

sector_energy_faq_1.q: What energy services does INFRA Construction provide?
sector_energy_faq_1.a: We provide power generation construction, transmission systems, substation engineering, distribution networks, and O&M services.

sector_energy_faq_2.q: Can you construct power plants from start to finish?
sector_energy_faq_2.a: Yes. INFRA provides complete EPC services for power generation facilities including engineering, procurement, construction, and commissioning.

sector_energy_faq_3.q: Do you offer operations and maintenance for power plants?
sector_energy_faq_3.a: Yes. We provide long-term O&M support, preventive maintenance, and operational management for power facilities.

sector_energy_faq_4.q: What regions do you operate in?
sector_energy_faq_4.a: We operate across the Middle East and Africa, with regional offices in the UAE, Egypt, Yemen, and Jordan.

sector_energy_faq_5.q: Are your energy projects compliant with international standards?
sector_energy_faq_5.a: Yes. All energy projects are designed and executed to international electrical, safety, and quality management standards.

sector_water_intro.p1: INFRA Construction provides comprehensive Water & Utilities infrastructure services — spanning water supply systems, wastewater treatment, dam construction, irrigation networks, desalination plants, and utility infrastructure. Our engineering teams bring decades of experience in water infrastructure delivery across some of the most challenging environments in the Middle East and Africa.
sector_water_intro.p2: We understand the critical importance of reliable, sustainable water infrastructure to communities, industrial operations, and regional development. INFRA Construction delivers water projects from engineering and design through construction, commissioning, and long-term operational support.
sector_water_intro.p3: Our water and utilities capabilities cover potable water supply networks, wastewater collection and treatment, dam and reservoir construction, irrigation infrastructure, desalination facilities, stormwater management, and integrated utility networks.
sector_water_intro.p4: INFRA Construction has a proven track record in water infrastructure — having delivered dams, water tanks, supply networks, and wastewater treatment projects across Yemen, Egypt, and other regional markets.

sector_water_feature_1.title: Dam Engineering Expertise
sector_water_feature_1.body: Extensive experience designing and constructing dams, reservoirs, and water storage infrastructure.

sector_water_feature_2.title: Water Supply Systems
sector_water_feature_2.body: Complete water supply networks from source to distribution, including treatment and storage.

sector_water_feature_3.title: Wastewater Treatment
sector_water_feature_3.body: Wastewater collection, treatment, and disposal systems for urban and industrial applications.

sector_water_feature_4.title: Irrigation Infrastructure
sector_water_feature_4.body: Agricultural irrigation systems supporting food security and rural development programmes.

sector_water_feature_5.body: Integrated utility systems combining water, wastewater, and stormwater management.

sector_water_feature_6.body: All water projects designed and constructed to international water and environmental standards.

sector_water_feature_7.body: Proven ability to deliver water infrastructure in remote and challenging environments.

sector_water_feature_8.title: Sustainable Solutions
sector_water_feature_8.body: Environmentally responsible water infrastructure supporting long-term sustainability objectives.

sector_epc_intro.p1: INFRA Construction provides comprehensive Engineering & EPC services designed to support the successful delivery of complex infrastructure, industrial, utility, transportation, and development projects. Our multidisciplinary engineering teams, project management specialists, procurement professionals, and construction experts work collaboratively to deliver integrated project solutions from concept through completion.
sector_epc_intro.p2: We understand that successful EPC project delivery requires technical precision, efficient coordination, procurement reliability, construction excellence, and operational discipline. INFRA Construction combines advanced engineering technologies, experienced personnel, strong supply chain networks, and proven management systems to execute projects efficiently while maintaining quality, safety, and schedule performance.
sector_epc_intro.p3: Our capabilities span engineering design, procurement management, construction execution, project controls, BIM coordination, quality assurance, testing and commissioning, and operational support.
sector_epc_intro.p4: INFRA Construction's engineering offices in Amman, Jordan and Cairo, Egypt maintain a permanent core staff of approximately 275 qualified professionals — capable of delivering over 150,000 engineering man-hours per year.
sector_epc_intro.p5: With international project experience and strong regional capabilities, INFRA Construction successfully delivers projects across multiple sectors and complex operational environments.

sector_epc_feature_1.body: End-to-end project delivery covering engineering, procurement, construction, and commissioning under one team.

sector_epc_feature_2.body: Modern engineering software, BIM systems, and digital coordination platforms for precision delivery.

sector_facilities_intro.p1: INFRA Construction delivers comprehensive Facilities Management & Operations services tailored to the unique requirements of commercial developments, industrial facilities, public infrastructure, utilities, residential communities, and institutional projects. Backed by decades of regional and international experience, we provide integrated operational solutions that ensure facilities remain safe, efficient, compliant, and sustainable throughout their lifecycle.
sector_facilities_intro.p2: Our approach combines technical expertise, proactive maintenance strategies, operational planning, and advanced asset management systems to help clients optimize performance while reducing operational costs.
sector_facilities_intro.p3: We support clients across various industries by providing both hard and soft facilities management services, operations management, preventive maintenance, corrective maintenance, asset lifecycle planning, infrastructure operations, and technical support services.
sector_facilities_intro.p4: INFRA Construction has developed a reputation for delivering dependable, high-quality facility services across governmental, private, industrial, and infrastructure sectors.

sector_industrial_intro.p1: INFRA Construction provides integrated Industrial & Oil Services designed to support the development, operation, maintenance, and expansion of industrial and energy infrastructure projects. Our multidisciplinary capabilities allow us to deliver technically advanced solutions for oil & gas facilities, petrochemical plants, industrial processing facilities, utility infrastructure, and energy-related developments.
sector_industrial_intro.p2: We understand the demanding nature of industrial environments where operational reliability, safety compliance, engineering precision, and efficient project execution are critical. Our teams combine engineering expertise, operational experience, advanced technology, and strict quality control systems to deliver projects that meet international industry standards.
sector_industrial_intro.p3: From pipeline engineering and plant construction to maintenance services and operational support, INFRA Construction provides end-to-end industrial solutions tailored to the requirements of each client and project environment.
sector_industrial_intro.p4: Our experience across regional and international markets enables us to manage projects in remote, complex, and technically demanding environments while maintaining operational safety, schedule efficiency, and construction quality.

sector_civil_intro.p1: INFRA Construction provides comprehensive Infrastructure & Civil Works services for public, private, industrial, transportation, utility, and development sectors. Our extensive project experience, multidisciplinary engineering expertise, and operational capabilities enable us to successfully deliver complex civil infrastructure projects across multiple regions.
sector_civil_intro.p2: Infrastructure development plays a critical role in economic growth, urban expansion, industrial advancement, and community improvement. INFRA Construction supports these objectives through high-quality engineering, efficient construction management, advanced technologies, and reliable project execution.
sector_civil_intro.p3: Our infrastructure capabilities cover roads, highways, bridges, utility networks, marine works, dams, ports, airports, drainage systems, transportation infrastructure, and heavy civil engineering works.
sector_civil_intro.p4: We combine technical expertise, operational efficiency, quality assurance systems, and strong project controls to deliver infrastructure projects that meet international standards while supporting long-term operational sustainability.

sector_civil_whyus_8.body: Resources and operational systems for project execution in remote and challenging environments.

sector_civil_faq_1.q: What infrastructure services does INFRA Construction provide?
sector_civil_faq_1.a: We provide roads, highways, bridges, marine works, utility infrastructure, airports, drainage systems, and civil engineering services.

sector_civil_faq_2.q: Do you execute transportation infrastructure projects?
sector_civil_faq_2.a: Yes. We deliver highways, bridges, transportation corridors, road widening, and public infrastructure projects.

sector_civil_faq_3.q: Can you manage marine and port infrastructure works?
sector_civil_faq_3.a: Absolutely. We provide marine engineering, breakwaters, floating piers, harbor infrastructure, and coastal civil works.

sector_civil_faq_4.q: Do you provide infrastructure construction management?
sector_civil_faq_4.a: Yes. We offer project management, construction supervision, quality control, planning, and operational coordination.

sector_civil_faq_5.q: Are your infrastructure projects compliant with international standards?
sector_civil_faq_5.a: Yes. All projects follow international engineering, safety, environmental, and quality standards.

news_1.title: INFRA Construction Group Partners with Shaanxi Construction
news_1.excerpt: INFRA Construction Group has entered into a strategic partnership with Shaanxi Construction Engineering Group Corporation, marking a significant expansion of global collaboration to deliver large-scale infrastructure projects across key markets.
news_1.author: INFRA Communications
news_1.p1: INFRA Construction Group has formalised a strategic partnership with Shaanxi Construction Engineering Group Corporation — the largest state-owned investment and construction group in Shaanxi Province, China — through the signing of a Memorandum of Understanding.
news_1.p2: The partnership is designed to combine INFRA's deep expertise in Middle Eastern and African markets with Shaanxi Construction's large-scale engineering capabilities and proven global delivery record. Together, the two organisations will target complex infrastructure programmes across multiple regions.
news_1.p3: This collaboration is expected to open new business development avenues, enhance competitive positioning, and enable both organisations to pursue projects that neither could as effectively approach independently. The agreement covers a wide range of infrastructure disciplines, including civil works, industrial projects, and large-scale transportation infrastructure.
news_1.p4: INFRA Construction's CEO and leadership team expressed strong confidence in the long-term value of this global partnership, noting that it aligns directly with the company's strategic direction and its commitment to delivering excellence across borders.

news_2.title: A Strategic Step Toward Kuwait: INFRA Explores Market Expansion Opportunities
news_2.excerpt: As part of its ongoing strategy to expand its footprint in development and infrastructure projects across Africa, Infra Construction has participated in the prequalification process for the construction of two vocational training centers in two cities in Somaliland, a project funded by the German Development Bank (KfW).
news_2.author: INFRA Communications
news_2.p1: As part of its ongoing strategy to expand its footprint in development and infrastructure projects across Africa, Infra Construction has participated in the prequalification process for the construction of two vocational training centers in two cities in Somaliland, a project funded by the German Development Bank (KfW).
news_2.p2: The company has successfully advanced to the shortlist alongside four other international firms and is currently proceeding through the technical evaluation and post-qualification stages, reflecting the strength of its expertise and its ability to compete in large-scale development projects.
news_2.p3: This achievement highlights the growing confidence in Infra Construction's capabilities as a reliable partner in delivering sustainable projects that support development and create a meaningful impact in the communities they serve.

news_3.title: As part of its commitment to advancing smart solutions and embracing cutting-edge technologies in the construction sector
news_3.excerpt: As part of its commitment to advancing smart solutions and embracing cutting-edge technologies in the construction sector, Infra Construction participated, in collaboration with Tamdeed, in a tender launched by the Municipality of Abu Dhabi for the implementation of an advanced AI-powered tower crane monitoring system.
news_3.author: INFRA Projects Team
news_3.p1: As part of its commitment to advancing smart solutions and embracing cutting-edge technologies in the construction sector, Infra Construction participated, in collaboration with Tamdeed, in a tender launched by the Municipality of Abu Dhabi for the implementation of an advanced AI-powered tower crane monitoring system.
news_3.p2: The project aims to enhance safety standards and operational efficiency across construction sites through intelligent monitoring solutions capable of real-time analysis and continuous supervision, supporting the ongoing digital transformation and smart city initiatives shaping the future of infrastructure and construction.
news_3.p3: This initiative reflects Infra Construction's continued focus on delivering innovative engineering solutions that contribute to safer, more efficient, and technologically advanced built environments.

news_4.title: Infra Construction has successfully completed and delivered two residential plots in Nad Al Sheba, Dubai
news_4.excerpt: Infra Construction has successfully completed and delivered two residential plots in Nad Al Sheba, Dubai, each featuring two standalone villas thoughtfully designed to offer exceptional privacy and a comfortable family living experience.
news_4.author: INFRA Communications
news_4.p1: Infra Construction has successfully completed and delivered two residential plots in Nad Al Sheba, Dubai, each featuring two standalone villas thoughtfully designed to offer exceptional privacy and a comfortable family living experience.
news_4.p2: The project was executed in line with the latest engineering standards, utilizing high-quality materials and meticulous attention to both interior and exterior finishing details. Every aspect reflects our commitment to delivering fully integrated residential developments that meet client expectations and align with modern lifestyle needs.
news_4.p3: At Infra Construction, consistent delivery at this level isn’t an exception — it’s our standard.

news_5.title: As part of its continuous efforts to explore expansion opportunities in the Kuwaiti market
news_5.excerpt: As part of its continuous efforts to explore expansion opportunities in the Kuwaiti market, Infra Construction held an important meeting with Go Green, attended by Sheikha Al Arefj, to discuss prospects for cooperation and joint investment. 🇰🇼🤝
news_5.author: INFRA Communications
news_5.p1: As part of its continuous efforts to explore expansion opportunities in the Kuwaiti market, Infra Construction held an important meeting with Go Green, attended by Sheikha Al Arefj, to discuss prospects for cooperation and joint investment. 🇰🇼🤝
news_5.p2: The meeting featured in-depth discussions on potential growth opportunities within Kuwait, where several strategic scenarios were reviewed to strengthen the company’s presence in the market. These included studying the possibility of opening a regional office in Kuwait, as well as exploring acquisition opportunities with local companies to support long-term growth and expansion plans.
news_5.p3: This step reflects Infra Construction’s strong commitment to expanding its presence in promising markets and strengthening relationships with partners and clients through well-planned expansion strategies based on effective partnerships and sustainable investment.

news_6.title: INFRA Strengthens Its Role Within HS Group with Focus on East Africa
news_6.excerpt: As part of strengthening its execution role within HS Group, INFRA Construction is expanding its presence in infrastructure, with a renewed strategic focus on East Africa — a key growth region for the Group.
news_6.author: INFRA Communications
news_6.p1: As part of a strategic initiative to strengthen its execution role within HS Group, INFRA Construction is expanding its operational presence in infrastructure — with a particular focus on East Africa as a key growth region.
news_6.p2: The initiative builds on INFRA's existing track record in the African continent and positions the company to take on larger, more complex programmes across East African markets.
news_6.p3: East Africa offers significant infrastructure development opportunities across transport, water, energy, and buildings sectors, driven by sustained economic growth and increasing public and private investment.
news_6.p4: INFRA's leadership confirmed that Abu Dhabi remains the operational hub and strategic base for all Group activities, with the East Africa focus representing a natural extension of the company's international project delivery capabilities.

news_7.title: INFRA Construction Signs Cooperation Agreement with Gradspan
news_7.excerpt: INFRA Construction is pleased to announce the signing of a cooperation agreement with Gradspan, a company specialised in construction and steel works within the UAE — expanding INFRA's delivery capabilities and specialist partnerships.
news_7.author: INFRA Communications
news_7.p1: INFRA Construction is pleased to announce the signing of a cooperation agreement with Gradspan, a company specialised in construction and steel works within the United Arab Emirates.
news_7.p2: The agreement formalises a collaborative framework between the two companies, enabling INFRA to leverage Gradspan's specialist expertise in steel construction — complementing INFRA's broad civil, infrastructure, and buildings capabilities.
news_7.p3: This partnership is expected to enhance INFRA's competitiveness on projects requiring integrated steel and civil construction delivery, and opens new avenues for joint business development across the UAE and wider regional markets.
news_7.p4: The cooperation with Gradspan is part of INFRA Construction's ongoing strategy to build a strong network of specialist partners, enabling the company to offer comprehensive, high-quality solutions across all construction disciplines.

careers_why.title: Build Your Career With Us
careers_why.p1: INFRA Construction offers a dynamic, challenging, and rewarding work environment for engineers, planners, project managers, and construction professionals. Our teams work on landmark infrastructure projects across the Middle East, Africa, and beyond — gaining experience that spans sectors, borders, and technical disciplines.
careers_why.p2: We are committed to developing our people. Whether you are a recent graduate or an experienced professional, INFRA provides the projects, the mentorship, and the professional growth opportunities that enable you to reach your full potential.

careers_benefit_1.title: Landmark Projects
careers_benefit_1.body: Work on significant infrastructure projects that shape communities and regions across the Middle East and Africa.

careers_benefit_2.title: Professional Growth
careers_benefit_2.body: Structured career development, technical training, and mentorship programmes for all levels.

careers_benefit_3.title: International Exposure
careers_benefit_3.body: Opportunities to work across multiple countries and gain broad regional and international experience.

careers_benefit_4.title: Collaborative Culture
careers_benefit_4.body: Supportive team environment where expertise is shared and contributions are valued at every level.

careers_benefit_5.title: Safety First
careers_benefit_5.body: A genuine commitment to health, safety, and wellbeing across all project sites and office environments.

careers_benefit_6.title: Competitive Package
careers_benefit_6.body: Competitive salaries, benefits, and recognition for high-performing team members.

careers_empower.title: We Empower Our People
careers_empower.p1: At INFRA Construction, we believe that the quality of our projects is a direct reflection of the quality of our people. We recruit talented individuals and invest in their growth through structured training, challenging project assignments, and a culture of continuous improvement.
careers_empower.p2: Our technical teams are supported by experienced leadership, modern tools, and a collaborative work environment that rewards initiative, creativity, and professional excellence.
